subcodes.first_line: This is an Epistle from the presence of Bahá unto him who hath been named Muhammad in the Book of Names, who soareth upon the wings of yearning in this atmosphere [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی البهاء الی من سمی بمحمد فی کتاب الاسماء یطیر باجنحة الاشتیاق فی هذا الهو
